content: Does anyone have any advice on making a team with these 2?

For Arc 1, you can use Chaos / Aequor Realm Characters so that you have access to Divine Aequor Realm Mechanics. Otherwise you can use any mixture of DPS / Support Units from any other Realm such as Thais, Aigis for Caro, Clementine / Horla for Ultra, etc. Once you get into Arc 2 though, you'll absolutely want to run a Team Comp composed of only Lemurian Faction Units; this will be GMurphy, Myriam, Tulu, Goliath and Faros.
I didnt know what chaos characters to use so i went for caro. I dont really what covents or cards to use for miryam or murphy
I think take out helot
She doesn't do much in that team, since your carry is Gmurphy
Replace her with goliath/caec/tulu/aigis
I have an effective-but-getting-old mouchette team, is there a decent ultra (or maybe aqueor?) team I can make with these guys? doesn't need to be pure
Hm. Maybe try Jenkins, castor, erika, winkle? Jenkins kind of wants e1 for the base damage scaling, but that should work.

Ahh sorry for the late response, was playing 20MTD on my End and was helping out another Person in <#1433513650299076780> but you should definitely follow Rain's advice on removing Helot for your Team as she favours DPS Units that benefit off of Strikes. You could use Caecus for some more Sustain / Survive Potential, Goliath for more Damage Potential or Aigis for Vulnerability + her unique Petrify Ability

i mean i can E1 the jenkins if she's going to see use in the future.  

erika and winkle over miryam?
Jenkins should be seeing some use in the future as one of your D-Tide Teams to earn the Bi - Weekly Silver unless you got a better DPS that you can revolve a Comp around of instead
not unless daffodil is secretly OP

Yeah. You could give miryam a try if you are interested. I think she fits reasonably well into the team as an aliemus battery over winkle. Idea of erika and winkle is that they provide aliemus battery and weakness + vuln without needing to be roused. Erika can also give you start of battle alert if you are in arc 2 ruleset which is nice with castor.
What cards and covenants do i use for them? I tried doing it on my on and it didnt go well
Your Team there typically wants to have eachother's Covenants & WoDs there ironically
Covenant - wise, you could probably do Life Drain on Thais, Twisted Twins (Black) on Aigis, Re - Evolution on Myriam and Crimson Pulse on GMurphy

On the WoD side of things, you can probably give GMurphy Blade of the Titan & Analysis of Death, Myriam Incalculable Factor and Gluttony, Thais Merciful Nurturing and Frenzy and Aigis Rewinding Time and Emerge

Not too keen on other alternatives that you may be able to use as you're lacking Enlightenments on GMurphy, Thais & Myriam doesn't particularly need to have their Enlightenments but they're not playing at high Effectiveness without them and in Aigis's case your full kit is pretty much active at E0 but Enlightenments are really nice to have for her and generally very inexpensive too
You're comparing one of the best SR wheels to possibly the most useless wheel in the game <:Jointhefun1:1400771646293282918>

you don't have to worry too much about stacking ultra space

and then i use annihilation to delay ultra round until boss is doing like a big attack
and i absolutely must make 1000 shield or kill boss this turn
then i go into ultra round
on the boss fight you can also do ultra round turn 1 to setup
and then save the second ultra round for a big attack
to give you more cards to defend
What cards go into that stack?? Sometimes it does sometimes it doesn't?
the 1st card you play each turn goes into ultra space

||it was kind of fun to see Clem manipulating the Keeper's senses. You start the battle thinking it's a two phase fight but she's actually hiding two extra lives. Really nice to the see the story impacting the actual fight!||

Hi! I'm kind of new to the game been playing for a month or so? Came at the middle of the anniversary and speed ran to get most rewards now I'm kind of stuck in the second arc of the story so I'd really appreciate it if someone would recommend a good team from my characters to help me clear the story?
This is the team I use right now
You should be using Miryam over GDoll
And probably Goliath or Faros over normal Murphy
She can work with GMurphy but usually you just want to stack Lemurian passives
Lemurian > all
Personally vote for Faros but after seeing people play with weak Murphys def run Goliath and Tulu
Faros is good for consistency but doesn't help a lot with damage
Yeah I tend to find the Tulu superfluous and much less helpful but after watching some of these players I understand why it cna be considered necessary
I definitely needed him for w4
So did I but that’s because it was my second Lemurian team and was working with scraps at that point
Tried it out and it works LOLLL but now my problem is I have to get used to countering and not full dmg
Was thinking more along the lines of giving him a Team with only Aequor Units like requested but yeah I get where you're coming from
Am i crazy for thinking this is a solid comp to run trough with early?
<@298922504259502081> & <@285755067213152257> thanks! I'll focus of leveling up Miryam and Goliath for now
Nah, that's a fine Comp to use early
As before Chapter 5 of Arc 2 NM
You can run just about anything
N' still be able to clear the entirety of Chapter 4
I see, thats nice to know. Guess my follow up question is how could i develop it into something that is of use later then?
Chapter 5 and onwards, you'll ideally want to run an actual DPS with 2 dedicated Supports and a Tanker Unit with either high Shielding or Death Resistance
You can probably keep Ramona & Caecus in, but you'll then need to find 2 other Characters from Aequor / Chaos to run
Unless you'll want to ditch either Realm or both to make something new
As you can see my early pulls feels like the game is telling me to run with Caecus
You can probably full clear normal mode with that team if its invested enough

The current Speedrun Comp that you can run is

Mouchette E3
Ramona Ex
Helot >E0
Aigis >E0
But thanks for the rundown, good to know i don't have to worry to much and can just chill to clear the content 👍
